text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Argh, I let a rule-breaker get away! I can't believe I did that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Inari, you gotta give me a good
tongue-lashing! Otherwise, I'll always
be a worthless good-for-nothing!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa! Quit bein' a blockhead.
You want me to set you straight?
No way I can do that!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Take a good look at yourself!
You do a kick-ass job — straight as an arrow.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You never turned your back from the
righteous path, so what's there to be
ashamed of?! Now stand up tall and
walk with some pride, will ya?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Get it? There's always next time!
Just be prepared and get it right
with the next one!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh, you never let me down!
You got a heart of gold! You're the best!!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! I couldn't ask for anyone better!
Now lay it on me!! Give me a good scolding!!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Uhh… Did ya listen to a single word I said?
